creator: tmseck@netcologne.de
text:
The Dillo Project has released the 2.0 version of dillo on October 14,
see <http://www.dillo.org>.

I plan to keep the old GTK1-based dillo as well as the probably no
longer needed dillo-i18n around until mid 2009 to ease the transition
for existing users while dillo2 is evolving.

Fix: After the repocopy is performed, please update www/dillo's CONFLICTS
definition:
